examples: Methionine, tryptophane and isoleucine of the legumes are in general lower than those of the animal products.
This paper describes the measurement of tryptophane with synchronized scan fluorescent spectroscopy in maize, wheat and pollen.
The method has been used to determine tyrosine and tryptophane in the artificial sample containing phenylalanine, tyrosine and tryptophane, the result is satisfactory.
